text: A hyper-realistic close-up portrait of a young woman with fair skin and natural freckles, captured in soft studio lighting. The model has light green eyes, naturally shaped eyebrows, and minimal makeup. Her lips are soft pink and slightly glossy. She wears long, dangling geometric diamond earrings made of square-shaped stones. The focus is on the right side of her face, with extremely sharp detail on her skin texture, pores, freckles, and fine lines. Her dark brown hair is pulled back tightly. She is dressed in a silky ivory satin fabric that softly reflects light. The background is clean, minimal, and softly blurred. The image has a subtle elegant mood, shallow depth of field, extreme close-up framing, high-resolution beauty photography, 85mm lens look, natural color grading, cinematic soft highlights, smooth bokeh.

Young Chinese woman in red Hanfu, intricate embroidery. Impeccable makeup, red floral forehead pattern. Elaborate high bun, golden phoenix headdress, red flowers, beads. Holds round folding fan with lady, trees, bird. Neon lightning-bolt lamp (⚡️), bright yellow glow, above extended left palm. Soft-lit outdoor night background, silhouetted tiered pagoda (西安大雁塔), blurred colorful distant lights.

Ethereal luminous female spirit with flowing translucent hair made of seafoam and bioluminescent particles sitting among vibrant abstract coral formations and shimmering jellyfish, mystical underwater dreamscape, maximalist healing illustration, surreal avant-garde style, blend of watercolor and grainy textures, large bold color blocks of deep blues, teals, and glowing greens, mysterious and dreamlike atmosphere
